summary: Senior Mobile Engineer and product architect with 8+ years building large-scale Android and Flutter applications. Leads technical direction across a 5-app production ecosystem at Harri — establishing Flutter as the cross-platform standard, standardizing Clean Architecture, and driving engineering quality across the mobile organization. Founder and technical architect of Tal3a: a multi-vendor logistics marketplace with TSP-inspired routing optimization, AI-native commerce, and a full merchant operations platform.
highlights: Spearheaded Flutter Add-to-App adoption at Harri, integrating Flutter modules into native Android apps and establishing it as the cross-platform standard across a 5-app production ecosystem
Architected MVVM + Clean Architecture across all Harri mobile products and led Java-to-Kotlin migration, standardizing development practices and eliminating technical debt at scale
Established engineering governance across the mobile organization — architectural reviews, mentoring practices, and cross-functional delivery coordination with Product, Design, Backend, and DevOps
Founder and technical architect of Tal3a: a multi-vendor logistics marketplace with TSP-inspired routing, AI-native conversational commerce (Al-Haj), and a full merchant operations platform (Tal3a+)

bullets: Led technical direction across 5 production Android and Flutter apps — TeamLive, HarriLive, HarriHire, TeamHub, and Hob Seeker — owning architecture, quality standards, and release strategy
Spearheaded Flutter Add-to-App adoption, integrating Flutter modules into existing native codebases and establishing it as the cross-platform standard for all new feature development
Architected MVVM + Clean Architecture rollout across all products using Android Jetpack, transitioning legacy ad-hoc codebases to a consistent, modular, and testable structure

Led Java-to-Kotlin migration across legacy codebases, eliminating null-safety vulnerabilities and improving developer velocity across the team; integrated Firebase, AWS Amplify, Cognito (OAuth 2.0), Pusher, and DataDog RUM across the full app ecosystem

Led AI adoption across the mobile engineering workflow — integrating Cursor IDE and Claude Code, establishing prompt-driven patterns for code generation, analysis, and refactoring, and architecting modular systems that support AI-powered feature integration without re-architecture
Established architectural review standards and mentoring practices, coordinating delivery across Product, Design, Backend, and DevOps for stable, consistent releases
Led end-to-end Flutter development of Momyt Meet, a location-based social discovery platform — owning architecture decisions, feature delivery, and team direction across 2 years

Designed real-time social discovery and meetup orchestration flows — anonymous matching, dual-sided activity creation (create/join), and proximity-based user filtering — managing complex multi-user interaction state
Implemented in-app chat, group-based discount mechanics, and geolocation-based filtering using MVVM + Provider, establishing scalable state management patterns for high-engagement social interactions
Owned end-to-end Flutter development of Primefyre — a fire safety inspection platform — architecting the mobile codebase from scratch and designing user flows for structured compliance workflows
Built form-heavy, workflow-driven features for on-site inspection tracking and safety reporting, translating complex B2B operational requirements into an intuitive field-ready mobile experience
Applied Clean Architecture principles to ensure a scalable, maintainable codebase capable of supporting expanding inspection and compliance feature sets
Engineered core features for the Yamsafer Android travel app — hotel search, filters, booking flows, and reservation management — using Retrofit and RxJava
Established unit test coverage for critical booking and networking components, improving release confidence and eliminating recurring production regressions

Delivered end-to-end cross-platform and Android-native applications for clients across e-commerce, productivity, and service domains — owning full development lifecycle from architecture through Play Store deployment using Flutter and React Native

projects.name: Tal3a
projects.description: Founder / Mobile Architect — multi-vendor marketplace with logistics optimization
bullets: Architected a multi-vendor e-commerce platform with unified checkout across multiple shops, solving complex order splitting and fulfillment coordination at scale
Engineered a TSP-inspired logistics model optimizing multi-vendor pickup routing, improving delivery efficiency and operational scalability
Led end-to-end development of the Flutter mobile ecosystem — customer app and Tal3a+ (merchant operations app) — from system architecture through production release
Built Al-Haj, an AI-native shopping assistant with conversational product discovery, LLM-driven recommendations, and guided checkout flows
Engineered vendor onboarding pipelines with bulk import (Excel + S3) and AI-assisted product extraction from WhatsApp inputs, reducing vendor adoption friction
Delivered a promotions and pricing engine (discounts, flash sales, coupons) with funding splits, validation rules, and commission impact modeling

projects.name: Lajnati
projects.description: Founder — Mobile-first building & community management platform
bullets: Architected a Flutter mobile platform digitizing residential committee operations — replacing manual processes with structured financial workflows across three access tiers (system admin, building admin, resident)
Designed a multi-building data hierarchy (Iskan → Building → Residents) with Firebase-backed real-time aggregation powering payment tracking, expense logging, and wallet ledger reporting
Built RTL-first UI optimized for non-technical committee members, with Clean Architecture enabling independent feature evolution across payment, announcement, and resident management modules

projects.name: Jaru
projects.description: Personal Project — Pet care & services marketplace
bullets: Built a cross-platform Flutter marketplace connecting pet owners with care providers during COVID-19 lockdowns — delivering multi-role onboarding (owner/provider), social login, and in-app wallet under rapid development constraints
Designed a scalable service discovery and booking flow with scoped role permissions, laying the architecture for provider-side service management and transaction handling
